title: Places and Community Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A person who helps sick people feel better.
choices: doctor
officer
sailor
rounds.answer: doctor
rounds.explanation: doctor: A person who helps sick people feel better.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A place where people solve problems fairly using the laws.
choices: doctor
officer
court
rounds.answer: court
rounds.explanation: court: A place where people solve problems fairly using the laws.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A door or way to go out of a place; to go out.
choices: officer
exit
doctor
rounds.answer: exit
rounds.explanation: exit: A door or way to go out of a place; to go out.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A person who helps keep people safe and makes sure rules are followed.
rounds.answer: officer

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A school for older students and adults.
rounds.answer: college

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A small group of homes in the countryside, smaller than a town.
rounds.answer: village

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: The doctor works at the hospital.
The sailor sails across the sea.
The court is next to the police station.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: A door or way to go out of a place; to go out.
A part of a country that has its own towns and rules.
A place where people buy and sell food and other things.
A small group of homes in the countryside, smaller than a town.
rounds.answer: A place where people buy and sell food and other things.
rounds.explanation: We bought bananas at the market.

choices: A line where two countries or places meet.
A part of a country that has its own towns and rules.
A place where plants, flowers or vegetables grow.
A small group of homes in the countryside, smaller than a town.
rounds.answer: A place where plants, flowers or vegetables grow.
rounds.explanation: There are tomatoes in our school garden.

choices: A door or way to go out of a place; to go out.

rounds.explanation: We used the back exit after the class.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: In my community there is a ______.
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We bought bananas at the market.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We used the back exit after the class.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We live in this county near the hills.
